backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the ExpenseX backend, defining data types (Account, Transaction, Budget, etc.) and per-user persistent storage with access control via MixinAuthorization. Includes default currencies, categories, and CRUD operations for all financial data.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (fixing account selector dropdowns, submit buttons, transfer modals, and accounts page actions) to their source files and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and key changes, serving as a reference for build planning and code review.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the ExpenseX React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component handling authentication state, profile setup modal display, theme/settings providers, and client-side page routing between Home, Records, Analysis, Accounts, and Settings pages.
Dialog modal for adding a new account with fields for name, account type (including custom), and initial balance, using the useAddAccount mutation on submit.
frontend/src/components/AddBudgetModal.t: Modal dialog for setting a monthly budget, supporting either an overall or category-specific budget amount, with form validation and submission via the useAddBudget mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/AddCategoryModal: Modal dialog for creating a new expense category by name, using the useAddCategory mutation hook and resetting the form on success.
frontend/src/components/AddTransactionMo: Modal dialog for adding an income or expense transaction, collecting amount, account, category, description, and date fields, then submitting via the useAddTransaction mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: Main application shell that renders a sticky header with navigation controls (dark mode toggle, settings, logout) and wraps page content above a bottom navigation bar.
frontend/src/components/BottomNavigation: Fixed bottom navigation bar with icons for Home, Records, Analysis, and Accounts pages, plus a floating action button that opens the AddTransactionModal.
frontend/src/components/BudgetOverview.t: Displays a list of monthly budgets with spending progress bars and status badges (warning/exceeded), and allows adding or deleting budgets via modals.
frontend/src/components/CategoryManageme: Lists default and custom expense categories with options to add, edit, or delete each, delegating actions to AddCategoryModal, EditCategoryModal, and ConfirmDeleteDialog.
frontend/src/components/ConfirmDeleteDia: A reusable alert dialog component for confirming delete actions, with Cancel and Delete buttons and an optional loading spinner.
frontend/src/components/DarkModeToggle.t: A button component that toggles dark mode using the useDarkMode hook, displaying a Sun or Moon icon based on current state.
frontend/src/components/EditCategoryModa: A dialog modal for editing a category's name, pre-populating the input with the existing name and submitting via the useEditCategory mutation.
frontend/src/components/LoginScreen.tsx: The login landing page for ExpenseX, displaying app features and a button to authenticate via Internet Identity.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name to set up their profile, using the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/TransferMoneyMod: A dialog modal for transferring money between accounts, with selectors for source/destination accounts, amount, and optional description.
frontend/src/context/SettingsContext.tsx: A React context provider that exposes app settings (currency symbol, language, amount formatter) fetched via useGetSettings.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useDarkMode.ts: A hook that manages dark mode state, persisting the preference to localStorage and toggling the 'dark' class on the document root.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing Internet Identity authentication state, login, and logout via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend data operations including user profiles, accounts, transactions, categories, budgets, and settings, wrapping actor calls with query/mutation patterns and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines CSS custom properties for a green/teal finance theme with light and dark mode variables, plus utility animations and safe-area helpers.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AccountsPage.tsx: Page component for managing financial accounts, providing UI to add, delete, and transfer money between accounts with dialogs and balance display using the currency from settings.
frontend/src/pages/AnalysisPage.tsx: Analytics page that displays income/expense summaries and charts (bar, pie, line) filtered by time period, with a PDF report download feature using recharts for visualization.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Dashboard home page showing total balance, monthly income/expense, a scrollable accounts summary, budget overview, and the five most recent transactions with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/RecordsPage.tsx: Displays a searchable, filterable list of transactions with sort options, and supports deleting individual transactions via a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: Settings page allowing users to change their currency and language (English/Hindi) preferences, with loading and saving states.
frontend/src/utils/budgetCalculations.ts: Utility functions for computing budget-related metrics such as current month expenses, category spending, budget status (normal/warning/exceeded), and overall budget info.
frontend/src/utils/chartCalculations.ts: Utility functions that transform transaction data into chart-ready formats including monthly bar data, category pie data, spending trends, and filtered totals.
frontend/src/utils/idGenerator.ts: Provides helpers to generate unique string IDs with a prefix and to get the current time as a nanosecond BigInt timestamp.
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Generates and triggers a printable HTML-based PDF financial report summarizing transactions with income, expense, and net totals for a given period.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (using oklch CSS variables), fonts, border radii, shadows, and animations, plus plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state descriptor for ExpenseX, a financial management app, documenting version, existing features, known issues (broken dropdowns, add button), architectural notes (Green/Blue theme, bottom nav, INR currency), and that the current build is a fix request.
